name: RoboRadio
genre: Mix of all kinds of music
description:
This station leans into the "Ran by Robots" vibe and has all the DJ's running "cloned" voice models of Robots/AIs from movies/TVs/games.

Current DJs include:

Bender (Futurama)
Cortana (Halo)
GlaDoS (Portal)
Hal9000 (2001 A Space Odyssey)
J.A.R.V.I.S. (Iron Man, Avengers)
Baymax (Big Hero 6)
TARS (Interstellar)
